summary: A Go-based CLI tool with a plugin system that detects, runs, and reports on schema-defined assertions, with Kubernetes integration.
concerns: automated session metadata commits polluting git history
untracked files and unstaged changes in working directory
watch mode feature appears incomplete or abandoned
suggestions: add session metadata to .gitignore to prevent auto-commit noise
clean up working directory and commit or discard untracked files
finalize or remove the archived watch-mode session metadata
